Description: Soap and skin cream - SPA Psor soap, 100gr Psoriasis is a genetic chronic skin disease. Psor soap is a unique hypoallergenic, natural handmade soap. The pH of this soap is optimal for irritated skin. It removes the dry layer of the skin, calms redness, relieves itching and effectively treats various skin problems. This soap is enriched with minerals from the Dead Sea. Benzoe - known for the relaxation of irritated skin. It also contains olive oil, dead sea mud, soothing aloe vera extract, chamomile, bergamot, geranium and tea tree oil. It also contains lavender oil and calendula oil, which are anti-inflammatory and healing for the tissue of the skin. Instructions for use Increases absorption. Generously soap the body - then let it work for 2 minutes and then rinse thoroughly. Proven results are felt after regular use. To complete the treatment, apply Psoderm to the cleaned areas. PSO Skin Relief Cream, 250ml The relief cream is a unique, natural and fast absorbing cream. It is enriched with herbal extracts that aim to soothe the skin and eliminate numerous skin problems such as skin irritation, itching, rash, extreme dryness followed by cracks, dandruff and redness. The cream is enriched with Dead Sea minerals, seaweed extract, soothing green tea extract and regenerating avocado oil. It contains olive oil for irritation relief and is beneficial against skin flaking. Also it is enriched with vitamins and antioxidants, shea butter for cell skin renewal, aloe vera extract for balanced moisture, ginseng, patchouli oil, chamomile, vitamin C + E. It also contains no steroids or tar derivatives. The special combination of rich ingredients moisturizes and soothes the skin significantly and improves the texture. Instructions for use Clean the affected areas and apply twice daily: morning and evening. The improvement can be felt after a few times of use and the skin is nourished and relaxed.

The soap has essential ingredients with extra virgin olive oil. Activated carbon has been added to the classic olive oil soap formula to effectively care for the skin exposed to daily stress. Activated carbon has the ability to bind and remove pollutants from the outer layer of the skin and prepares it to take the care it deserves. It balances the fat level of the skin and is considered effective in the treatment of eczema and psoriasis. Removes excess sebum from the pores and is an excellent weapon in the fight against acne. Activated carbon is also regarded as an inhibitor of premature aging and skin flaccidity. Ideal for daily use on face and body. Suitable for all skin types. Ingredients Sodium olivate, sodium cocoate, carbon, sodium almondate, sodium wheat germ, fragrance.
Short description: A gentle, skin-friendly soap suitable for daily use. For deep cleansing and detoxification. The soap has essential ingredients with extra virgin olive oil.

Name: Olive soap with Scandinavian pine resin - Thraco - 110gr
Description: Olive soap with Scandinavian pine resin - Thraco - 110g Following the traditional Scandinavian soap recipe with pine resin, we offer a natural soap with the essential ingredient of extra virgin olive oil to which we have added high quality natural oils. Soap with an unmistakable pine aroma. Scandinavian pine resin is known for its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. It is considered effective in the treatment of dermatological problems such as eczema, psoriasis and dandruff. Ideal for the care of skin areas affected by everyday stress. Gentle soap for body and hair. This soap is not recommended for very dry skin. Ingredients Sodium Olivate, Sodium Cocoate, Palustris (Pine) Wood Tar, Sodium Almondate, Sodium Weatgermate, Fragrance.
Short description: Following the traditional Scandinavian soap recipe with pine resin, we offer a natural soap with the essential ingredient of extra virgin olive oil.

Short description: Both olive oil and the soap's other natural oils have been combined with donkey milk to give your skin the nutrition, moisture and suppleness it deserves.

Name: Crealoe Anti Aging Day Cream, 50ml
Description: Crealoe Anti Aging Day Cream, 50ml The Cretan Goods anti-aging day cream with 100% natural aloe yeast extract and Thermus Thermophilus enzyme. The cream has regenerative and soothing properties and nourishes the skin with its valuable ingredients, since it helps to maintain the freshness and elasticity of the epidermis. It is lagging behind the signs of aging. It has an intensive moisturizing effect. It acts as a protective layer on the skin and stores the natural moisture. With its composition, it stimulates the 6 main building blocks of the skin matrix: collagen I, collagen III, fibronectin, hyaluronic acid, laminin, collagen IV and ensures a better tissue structure. It fills the wrinkles on the inside of both the forehead and the leg and ensures noticeably smoother and firmer skin. It contains an activity that mimics the protective enzymes naturally occurring on the skin against free radicals (antioxidants) such as SOD, catalase and glutathione peroxidase. During the test it was also observed that important signs of aging such as defects (skin graft anomaly and superficial capillaries), wrinkles, freckles and spots caused by UV radiation were reversed. It also helps prevent skin aging so that you look younger for longer. Tests showed that the skin can be five years younger in just 6 months of use. For all skin types, especially for “tired” skin.

Name: Vevi Original Greek Thyme, 70g
Description: Vevi Original Greek Thyme, 70g Thyme is native to Greece, southern Europe and the Mediterranean region. This herb is packed with numerous health-promoting phytonutrients, minerals and vitamins that are essential for general well-being. Botanically it belongs to the Lamiaceae family, in the genus Thymus. There are a lot of subspecies, of which the most popular variety is Thymus vulgaris. The thyme plant is a perennial shrub with a thin woody base and square stems. It grows about 15 to 30 cm long, has small, light green leaves, including lighter, slightly curved, aromatic leaves. In summer, small, fragrant, lilac-colored or white flowers appear. Some health benefits of thyme: Thyme contains many active ingredients known to have disease prevention and health-promoting properties. a rich source of important vitamins like the vitamins of the B-complex, β-Carotin, vitamin A, vitamin K, vitamin E, vitamin C and folic acid. Thyme provides 0.35 mg vitamin B-6 or pyridoxine which is about 27% of the recommended daily dose and maintains the GABA level (a favorable neurotransmitter in the brain) which helps breaking down stress
Short description: This herb is packed with numerous health-promoting phytonutrients, minerals and vitamins that are essential for general well-being.

Name: Vevi Original Ceylon Black Tea, 120g
Description: Vevi Original Ceylon Black Tea, 120g There are many antioxidants and polyphenols in black tea, which are associated with a number of health benefits. For instance black tea contains complex flavonoids, polyphenols, which prevents several disease. A single cup of black tea contains ca. 200 mg of flavonoids -many doctors today recommend taking 600 mg of flavonoids per day to achieve a number of health benefits. The flavonoid polyphenols in black tea, known as thearubigin and theaflavin, act as particularly powerful antioxidants. Interestingly, these two flavonoids are more concentrated in black tea than in green tea. Nutritional value of black tea Black tea contains : caffeine Amino acids Carbohydrates Proteins Potassium Main and trace elements Manganese fluoride Polyphenols
Short description: Black tea contains complex flavonoids and polyphenols, which prevents several disease.

Name: Vevi Original Greek Oregano, 70g
Description: Vevi Original Greek Oregano, 70g Oregano is a great perennial culinary and medicinal herb. It has long been recognized as one of the "functional foods" because of its nutritious, antioxidant and disease prevention properties. Oregano means "joy of the mountains" in Greek, is native to the Mediterranean region. Botanically it belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae), in the genus Origanum and is scientifically known as Origanum vulgare. The small oregano shrub grows up to 75 cm high with small grey-green oval leaves and small white or pink flowers. The leaves have a distinct aromatic, warm and slightly bitter taste which intensity varies. For example, a good quality oregano is so strong that it almost numbs the tongue. However, the influences of climate, season and soil have a greater influence on the composition of the essential oils than biodiversity. Origanum heracleoticum is another Greek variety that has an unmistakable pungent smell and taste.
Short description: Oregano is a great perennial culinary and medicinal herb.

Short description: This tea, also called verbena, mountain and shepherd's tea, is a genus of flowering plants and most known as a herbal tea.

Name: Vevi Original Ceylon Green Tea, 120g
Description: Vevi Original Ceylon Green Tea, 120g Due to its lower caffeine content green tea is a healthier alternative for normal drinks such as coffee or other teas. It also contains a high amount of natural antioxidants called polyphenols, which not only contribute to a healthy body, skin and hair, but also can reduce the growth of cancer cells. Green tea is also a healthier option because of the way it is processed from the plant, Camellia sinensis. The green leaves for green tea are steamed, which helps prevent oxidation of the catechins, while black tea is made from fermented leaves, which leads to the loss of this very important antioxidant. Recently, many people living in Western countries have switched from black tea to green tea.
Short description: Due to its lower caffeine content green tea is a healthier alternative for normal drinks such as coffee or other teas.

Description: Landseife - Peppermint Exfoliating Soap, 100g Organic Peppermint Exfoliating Land Soap is ideal for calluses and stubborn dirt, as well as to support skin regeneration. Many people struggle with cracked calluses, such as on feet and elbows, due to stress. Often, rubbing these areas with something too harsh, such as a pumice stone, can cause the skin in these areas to dry out even more and perhaps even get injured. Bacteria can enter and cause painful inflammation. Not so with the Organic Peppermint Exfoliating Soap. The almond stone/olive seed granules used here are finely ground to be a gentle exfoliant and not too aggressive to the skin. Organic cocoa butter and organic avocado oil provide rich and lasting care for stressed areas. The contained shea butter provides additional moisture. This soap is also ideal for restoring gentle and, most importantly, clean care to much-used gardener's hands. Description: Kalliston ապրանքանիշի օճառ՝ ձիթապտղի յուղով և քրքումով Նկարագրություն։ Kalliston ապրանքանիշի օճառը՝ պարունակելով ձիթապտղի և կոկոսի յուղ, պաշտպանում է մաշկը ժամանակից շուտ ծերացումից ,քանի որ այն պարունակում է հակաօքսիդանտներ։Այն հարուստ է բարձր որակի քրքումի փոշիով ,որը նույպես պարունակում է հակաօքսիդանտներ։Օճառն ապահովում է մաշկի ինտենսիվ խնամք և հիանալի թարմության զգացողություն,այն պաշտպանում է մաշկը ջրազրկումից և բարելավում է վերջինիս որակը։ Բաղադիրչներ։ Քրքումի փոշին հարուստ է հզոր հակաօքսիդանտներով,ինչպիսիք են տուրմերոնը և քրքումը,որոնք հաղորդում են մաշկին հանգստացնող և պաշտպանիչ հատկություններ։Կոկոսի յուղը հարուստ է վիտամիններով,միներալներով և հակաօքսիդանտներով,որոնք անփոխարինելի են մաշկի և մազերի խնամքի համար։Հետազոտությունները ցույց են տվել օճառի դրական ազդեցությունը շատ չոր պայմաններում։ Առաքման և մաքսազերծման ծախսերը գումարվում են գնման գնին,վճարմանը ենթակա ուղղակիորեն ուղարկողին։

Description: Լոգանքի գել տղամարդկանց համար թեյի ծառի յուղով Նկարագրություն։ Լոգանքի գել տղամարդկանց համար թեյի ծառի և փայտի յուղով։Նրբորեն մաքրում է մաշկը կեղտից,առանց գրգռելու այն։Իսկ թեյի ծառի և փայտի յուղը կանխում է վատ հոտի ի հայտ գալը ՝առաջացնելով թարմության զգացում։Բացի այդ այն պարունակում է օրգանիկ ձիթապտղի յուղ, որը խոնավեցնում է մաշկը այն փափուկ դարձնելով։ Օգտագործման կարգը։ Մերսելով քսեք խոնավ մաշկին։Այնուհետև լավ լվացեք մարմինը տաք ջրով։ Բաղադրիչները։ Օրգանական ձիթապտղի յուղ,թեյի ծառի յուղ, տրեհալոզա: Չի պարունակում՝ MINERAL OIL,SILICONE,EDTA,BHT,DEA,SYNTHETIC COLORANTS,SLS-SLES ։ Առաքման և մաքսազերծման ծախսերը գումարվում են գնման գնին։ Read more Show less

Name: Բաբմուկից պատրաստված ատամի խոզանակ

Description: Aegean Beauty արևապաշտշան լոսյոն դեմքի և մարմնի համար օրգանական Սիրոսի լիլիով 150մլ Kiss the Sun Արևապաշտպան լոսյոն դեմքի և մարմնի համար,պաշտպանման 30 ինդեքսով,շուշանի ,Սիրոսի օրգանական ալոե վերայի և հիբիսկուսի էքստրակտով։Բարձր արևային ճառագայթից պաշտպանման աստիճանով՝UVA և UVB։Այս արևապաշտպան կրեմը կարելի է օգտագործել ամեն օր,տարին՝ 12ամիս։Այն պաշտպանում է արևի ազդեցությունից և ծերացումից,խոնավեցնում է մաշկը և բարելավում մաշկի առաձգականությունը։Ունի հակաօքսիդանտ ազդեցություն ի շնորհիվ լիլիի և ալոե վերայի,որոնք հարուստ են վիտամին C-ով,օմեգա 3 ճարպաթթվով և ֆլավոնոիդներով։Կարող են օգտագործել և՛ կանայք և՛ տղամարդիկ,ինչպես նաև 6տարեկանից մեծ երեխաները։ Մաշկաբանների կողմից փորձարկված արտադրանք։Չի փորձարկվում կենդանիների վրա։Միայն արտաքին օգտագործման համար խուսափեք շամպունի աչքերի հետ շփումից։
